meaning: adj.和平的,平静的,安宁的,爱好和平的
examples: I was amazingly light-hearted and peaceful.
The prospects for a peaceful solution are dim.
The aims of the organization are wholly peaceful.
Icelanders might be a peaceful people, but their homeland is a place of geological violence.
But these days, it has a more genteel atmosphere as an upmarket suburb and peaceful fishing village.
